name: Sun Country Airlines Holdings, Inc.
summary: PART I Overview Sun Country Airlines is a new breed of hybrid low-cost air carrier that dynamically deploys shared resources across our synergistic passenger service (including Scheduled Service and Charter) and cargo service segments. By doing so, we generate high growth, high margins and strong cash flows with greater resilience than other passenger airlines. Based in Minnesota, we focus on serving leisure and VFR passengers, Charter customers, and providing CMI service to Amazon, with flights...
